articles.title: WAF Joins the International Sport for All Federation
articles.summary: The World Armwrestling Federation (WAF) is proud to announce that has joined the International Sport for All Federation (FISpT) as a new Committee Member. Within FISpT, each unique sport is represented by a single global governing body, and WAF is thrilled to begin this beautiful partnership to promote inclusive and accessible physical activity worldwide. As […]

articles.title: Welcome to the 2026 World Championships
articles.summary: Welcome to the 2026 WAF World Championships The World Armwrestling Federation is proud to officially invite all WAF Member Federations to participate in the 47th World Armwrestling Championship and the 28th World Para Armwrestling Championship, to be held in New Delhi, India, from 26 October to 7 November 2026. Hosted by the People’s Armwrestling Federation […]
